title: DL1 4PZ, Total Recycling Services Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/NP3330CU/V003
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit, decision document for:   Operator name: Total Recycling Services Limited Installation name: Lingfield Way Recycling and Treatment Centre Permit number: EPR/NP3330CU/V003  "
